title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOBON, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 4254 / 57 OG No. 13, 2291 (March 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2895, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOBON, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
